Localization.Description: A reverse-shell connection using a Bash script

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A reverse-shell connection to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} using a Bash script is detected on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host} created a reverse-shell connection to host {dst.host}:{dst.port} using a Bash script
